# GMZcodes

> 👨‍💻 Dani Gamez's personal website PWA built using vanilla JavaScript, SCSS and HTML5.
> 🚀 Check it out at https://gmzcodes.com!

## Description

Dani Gámez Franco - Staff Web3 Software Engineer / Architect - Summa Cum Laude Computer Science Engineer - Top 1.5% at StackOverflow - JS, TS, React, Next.js, Node.js, tRPC, Clean Software Architecture
